Definition: Regional adjustments based on FIPS codes (fips_code) in configuration file
Yearly adjustments based on calving year; defined by simulation time period (time.end_date.year)
Adjustments based on milking frequency (cow_times_milked_per_day) in the animal input file
Default: 2 or 3 (classified as twice daily (< 2.5 milkings per day) or thrice daily (≥ 2.5 milkings/day))

Definition: Adjustments to lactation curve based on parity (firs,t second, third+)
